author: yesbhautik
name: Standard V6: Mixed int6/int8 + fp16 last-k + SWA50 + zstd-22 + Sliding Window
blurb: Standard FineWeb training. 9-layer MLP-3x, SmearGate, BigramHash (4096 buckets), mixed quantization (int6 for MLP/attention, int8 elsewhere), STE disabled, fp16 passthrough for tok_emb + last-layer c_k, Muon WD=0.04, dense SWA (every 50), zstd-22, sliding eval stride=64, seq2048, batch=786K.
